quote: Best orthopedic surgeon in Havasu AZ. Easy to work with and explains options well. Thank you!!
Dr. Barnes came to my rescue. He is kind, funny, knowledgeable, and informative. 10/10 recommended Dr. Barnes!!!
Professional and personal service.
He takes the time to explain everything.
Very patient friendly, also his office staff is friendly and considerate. Scott is an amazing assistant.
Professional service. Dr. Barnes took time to explain all my options. Would definitely recommend him to everyone seeking help.
Excellent doctor. He takes the time needed to answer all of my questions and explain everything in a way that is easy to understand.
The office staff is excellent. Scott is great. Dr. Barnes is kind, professional, very competent, and listens intently.
One of the best doctors I’ve ever seen. He’s knowledgeable, informative, and recommends the treatment you’re most comfortable with.
Outstanding care. Dr. Barnes is caring and competent. I trust him for all my care and treatment.
Great Dr. and super friendly!
Staff is very knowledgeable and Dr. Barnes is caring.
Dr. Barnes is awesome. He explained everything every step of the way, including the process and what to expect.
Great doctor. He diagnosed me after hearing my history and sent me for tests and a plan of action for pain relief in my knee.
Dr. Barnes treated me for trigger finger and a cyst in the right hand. I experienced no pain during or after surgery and felt I was in good hands.
Explained all options and the procedure thoroughly. Great bedside manner, and great doctor.
Very knowledgeable and patient friendly. I highly recommend Dr. Barnes. He did a superb job on my knee.
From start to finish, he exemplified the highest standards of medical excellence. Dr. Barnes is, without a doubt, the best of the best.
He attended to a broken arm and tibia hardware removal. I really like his attitude and knowledge — good sense of humor too.
Since the first appointment, he has been so friendly and thoroughly explained options and procedure. Great bedside manner too.
Very thorough, professional, efficient, and caring. As a retired nurse, I am very picky about who I trust with my care.
